Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT F&M OBERTI INC., and, MARCELLA OBERTI MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: John Fitzpatrick Vannucci, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 981-7500 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Karen L. Moore, Esq. of Low, Ball, & Lynch (415) 981-6630, appearing for Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for summary judgment granted. Defendant shifts the burden and plaintiff fails to raise a triable issue of fact. Bluer testimony lacks foundation and does not establish a dangerous condition. Order re: Defendants F&M Oberti, Inc.'s and Marcella Oberti's objections to evidence submitted by Plaintiff Maria Chavez in opposition to Motion for Summary Judgment, and supplemental Order filed in Open Court and copies given to counsel at today's hearing.
